form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 2nd of 10 at Chelmsford on March 12 over 1400m, 1.0 len behind Denver Doll carrying 58kg at $5.50. Previously second-up 2nd of 10 at Chelmsford on October 30 over 1400m, 3 len behind Applesandpears carrying 58kg at $3.80. Likely to hold the good form and play a major role again.
